basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Madras has released the official notification for 40 Assistant Professor posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Tamil Nadu. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not completed 36 years as on 31 Dec 2026. Age relaxation applicable for OBC, SC/ST, PwD and women candidates.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not completed 36 years as on 31 December 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC, SC/ST, PwD, and women candidates as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree. Specialization in the appropriate area/branch with consistently good academic record throughout.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Grade II): Ph.D., First class or equivalent at the preceding degree, Specialization in the appropriate area/branch with consistently good academic record throughout. Less than three years of post-Ph.D. industrial/ research/ teaching experience. Assistant Professor (Grade I): Ph.D., First class or equivalent at the preceding degree, Specialization in the appropriate area/branch with consistently good academic record throughout. At least three years of post-Ph.D. industrial/ research/ teaching experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor (Data Science and Artificial Intelligence)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Assistant Professor (Data Science and Artificial Intelligence)

salary_details.pay_scale: Assistant Professor Grade-II: Pay Level: 10, Minimum Pay: ₹ 70900/-. Assistant Professor Grade-I: Pay Level: 12, Minimum Pay: ₹ 101500/-.
salary_details.details: Assistant Professor Grade-II: 7th CPC Pay Level 10, Minimum Basic Pay: ₹ 70,900/-. Approximate total emoluments including HRA: ₹ 1,71,300/-. Approximate total emoluments excluding HRA: ₹ 1,50,000/-. Assistant Professor Grade-I: 7th CPC Pay Level 12, Minimum Basic Pay: ₹ 1,01,500/-. Approximate total emoluments including HRA: ₹ 2,29,400/-. Approximate total emoluments excluding HRA: ₹ 1,99,000/-.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-10-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Madras Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Assistant Professor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor (Grade II): Ph.D., First class or equivalent at the preceding degree, Specialization in the appropriate area/branch with consistently good academic record throughout. Less than three years of post-Ph.D. industrial/ research/ teaching experience. Assistant Professor (Grade I): Ph.D., First class or equivalent at the preceding degree, Specialization in the appropriate area/branch with consistently good academic record throughout. At least three years of post-Ph.D. industrial/ research/ teaching experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Assistant Professor Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Assistant Professor Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: Not completed 36 years as on 31 December 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC, SC/ST, PwD, and women candidates as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Assistant Professor Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor Grade-II: 7th CPC Pay Level 10, Minimum Basic Pay: ₹ 70,900/-. Approximate total emoluments including HRA: ₹ 1,71,300/-. Approximate total emoluments excluding HRA: ₹ 1,50,000/-. Assistant Professor Grade-I: 7th CPC Pay Level 12, Minimum Basic Pay: ₹ 1,01,500/-. Approximate total emoluments including HRA: ₹ 2,29,400/-. Approximate total emoluments excluding HRA: ₹ 1,99,000/-.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Madras Assistant Professor Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-10-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the IIT Madras Assistant Professor positions is 15th October 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. with first-class or equivalent in their preceding degree, along with a consistently good academic record in their specialization area.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor positions across various departments at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit is set at not completed 36 years as of 31st December 2026. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Assistant Professor Grade-II?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor Grade-II will receive a minimum basic pay of ₹ 70,900/- in Pay Level 10, with approximate total emoluments around ₹ 1,71,300/- including HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Assistant Professor Grade-I?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor Grade-I will receive a minimum basic pay of ₹ 1,01,500/- in Pay Level 12, with approximate total emoluments around ₹ 2,29,400/- including HRA.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive by IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor role at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an initial screening of applications followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply for this position?
faq.answer: While the notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Tamil Nadu, the official website and application portal should be checked for specific eligibility regarding domicile.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
